EmailTemplate.name: Demand Letter
EmailTemplate.subject: Demand Letter
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!RW_Demand__c.Booking__r.Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
This is to inform you that Demand Letter has been generated for the Demand - {!RW_Demand__c.Name} And Demand Number - {!RW_Demand__c.RW_Billing_Document_Number__c} Please go through the Attached File.
Thanks, Runwal Team
